name: Steak & Parmesan-Grilled Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 t-bone or porterhouse steak, 1 inch thick
2 red or yellow bell peppers, quartered
1 large red onion cut crosswise into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sure your steaks are well trimmed of fat.
2. In a small bowl, combine the seasoning ingredients; mix well. Reserve 4 teaspoons of the seasoning mixture.
3. Press the reserved seasoning mixture onto both sides of the beef steaks.
4. Add cheese, oil, and vinegar to the remaining seasoning, mixing well. Set aside.
5. Place the steaks in the center of the grill over medium ash-covered coals. Arrange the vegetables around the steaks.
6. Grill the steaks uncovered for 14 to 16 minutes for medium rare to medium doneness, turning occasionally.
7. Grill the peppers for 12 to 15 minutes and the onion for 15 to 20 minutes, or until tender, turning once during grilling.
8. Brush the vegetables with the reserved cheese mixture during the last 10 minutes of grilling.
9. Season the steaks with salt, as desired. Remove bones.
10. Carve the steaks crosswise into thick slices. Serve with grilled vegetables.
